title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!
